steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Ulfheim says he has ‘the honour of addressing no less a person than the great Sculptor Rubek.’ The question asks what function this underlined phrase serves in the text.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It reveals that Professor Rubek first met Ulfheim many years ago.: The underlined portion says nothing about when or where they met. ✗
  • Choice B — It emphasizes that Professor Rubek has a distinguished reputation.: The intensifying language — ‘honour,’ ‘no less a person than,’ ‘the great’ — marks Rubek as someone of high standing. ✓
  • Choice C — It suggests that Ulfheim prefers autumn to spring, summer, or winter.: The passage contains no reference to seasons. ✗
  • Choice D — It indicates that many other sculptors are more famous than Professor Rubek.: This directly contradicts the passage, which presents Rubek as ‘the great’ sculptor. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
